blockedAssertions.blockedBy: POST /api/viewer/validate endpoint not yet implemented (API milestone). Underlying library functions (validateShareToken, issueViewerJwt) pass all unit tests.
POST /api/viewer/validate endpoint not yet implemented (API milestone). Unit tests confirm validateShareToken correctly rejects expired grants.
POST /api/viewer/validate endpoint not yet implemented (API milestone). Unit tests confirm validateShareToken correctly rejects revoked grants.
POST /api/viewer/validate endpoint not yet implemented (API milestone). Unit tests confirm correct JWT TTL calculation (min(grant_expires, now + 4h)).
POST /api/viewer/validate endpoint not yet implemented (API milestone). Unit tests confirm all required JWT claims present (grantId, ownerId, allowedMetrics, dataStart, dataEnd, iat, exp, jti).

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Auth API' section with auth testing details: curl examples, secret values, seed data info, viewer JWT structure, isolation rules, and test file locations.
